expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: Phase 0 model notice delivered per spec.

expectations.text: Response does NOT include an Assumption Map table
expectations.evidence: No Assumption Map produced — went directly to Phase 2 first question.

expectations.text: First question includes a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question about domain boundary alignment and ORM table sharing.
Recommendation: map every model to a service owner before committing to 8 services; start with 2–3 for the first phase.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No scorecard delivered. Agent correctly noted interrogation must continue before a scorecard is possible.

expectations.text: Agent mentions launching or attempting background agents for research
expectations.evidence: Agent tool not available — both background agents attempted, fell back to Glob/WebSearch. WebSearch also denied. Noted explicitly.
